common.workspaceDescription: Local demo for enterprise equipment accounting and control

roleDescription.ADMIN: Full access to the system, users, reports, audit log, and critical operations.
roleDescription.MANAGER: Manages equipment, issuances, repairs, inventory checks, and reports.
roleDescription.INVENTORY_MANAGER: Handles operational equipment accounting, inventory checks, issuances, and repair tickets.
roleDescription.REPAIR_COORDINATOR: Handles repair pickup tasks: collect equipment, deliver it, and update the task status.
roleDescription.EMPLOYEE: Views personal data, notifications, and assigned equipment.
roleDescription.AUDITOR: Views reports, action history, and audit log without changing data.
roleDescription.VIEWER: Read-only mode for demonstration and control.
roleDescription.fallback: Access rights are defined by the user's role.

login.title: Enterprise equipment accounting and control
login.subtitle: Dashboard, issuances, repairs, inventory, audit log, notifications, and reports in one local MVP for diploma defense.
login.formSubtitle: Demo access for the committee and role checks.

dashboard.title: Operational dashboard
dashboard.description: Asset balance, issuances, repairs, risks, and recent actions in one place.

equipment.title: Equipment
equipment.description: Registry with owners, locations, statuses, and movement history.
equipment.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, number, serial number, owner...
equipment.notFoundDescription: Change the search query or status filter.
equipment.name: Name
equipment.controlCardText: Main local scenario: owner, location, issuances, repairs, and audit log.
equipment.financeHidden: Detailed operations are hidden for this role; only summary indicators are available.

employees.title: Employees
employees.description: Employee directory for equipment assignment and issuance history.
employees.searchPlaceholder: Search by full name, department, position, or email...
employees.formDescription: Employee profile for equipment assignments and issuance history.

repairPickup.description: Control who collects equipment, where it must be delivered, and whether the transfer is completed.
repairPickup.emptyDescription: Assign a coordinator in a repair ticket, and the task will appear here.
repairPickup.commentPlaceholder: Example: equipment accepted in the repair zone and handed to an engineer
repairPickup.commentHint: The comment will be saved in the task card and helps confirm the action during defense.
repairPickup.loadError: Could not load repair pickup tasks.

finance.title: Equipment Finance
finance.description: Residual value, repair costs, and financial operations by asset.

reports.title: Reports and Export
reports.description: CSV for Excel and PDF for official presentation, printing, and defense.
reports.unavailableDescription: Global reports are hidden for this role. Contact an administrator or auditor.
reports.downloadError: Could not download the report. Check access rights or try again.
reports.equipmentDescription: Inventory sheet of assets: statuses, owners, locations, value, and warranty.
reports.issuancesDescription: Equipment movement by employees: active, returned, and overdue issuances.
reports.repairsDescription: Maintenance: reasons, priorities, statuses, cost, and results.
reports.financeDescription: Residual value, depreciation, repair costs, and expensive maintenance assets.
reports.pickupDescription: Who collects equipment, delivery destination, due dates, and pickup statuses.
reports.inventoryDescription: Official check act: found, missing, moved, damaged.
reports.auditDescription: User action and system event history for auditors.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Active session data, role, and personal interface settings.
profile.sessionText: The demo account works through JWT and browser local storage.
profile.themeDescription: The theme is saved locally and applied after reload.
profile.languageDescription: Language is saved locally and applied immediately without reload.

about.title: About
about.description: Diploma topic: development of an automated enterprise equipment accounting and control system.
about.systemText: The project demonstrates not just a CRUD page, but the full lifecycle of material assets: registration, issuance, repair, inventory, reporting, and user action control.
about.rolesText: ADMIN manages everything, MANAGER and INVENTORY_MANAGER work with assets, REPAIR_COORDINATOR handles repair pickup, EMPLOYEE sees personal data and notifications, AUDITOR views reports and audit log, VIEWER only views regular data and reports.
processes: Finance: value, depreciation, and repair costs
Audit log, notifications, and CSV/PDF reports

adminUsers.title: Users and Roles
adminUsers.description: RBAC: ADMIN, MANAGER, INVENTORY_MANAGER, REPAIR_COORDINATOR, EMPLOYEE, AUDITOR, VIEWER.

backup.title: Backup
backup.restoreConfirm: WARNING! The current database will be overwritten by data from the file. Continue?
backup.createCopyText: Download a full SQL database copy. It includes all table structure and current data.
backup.restoreText: Upload an .sql file to restore. WARNING: current data will be overwritten!

auditLog.title: Audit Log
auditLog.description: Immutable history of important user actions.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Events for issuances, repairs, overdue items, and inventory checks.

issuances.title: Issuances and Returns
issuances.returnPlaceholder: Example: returned without damage, full kit

repairsPage.title: Repair Tickets
repairsPage.description: Control defects, priorities, and repair costs.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Checks for equipment presence, movement, and damage.
inventory.selectCheck: Select a check on the left.
